title: Section 132A
content: 1[132A. Penalty for failure to observe procedure for voting--If any elector to whom a ballot paper has been issued, refused to observe the procedure prescribed for voting the ballot paper issued to him shall be liable for cancellation.]
footnote: 1. Ins. by Act 4 of 1986, s. 2 and Schedule (w.e.f. 15-5-1986).
